Operation 'boardCopy' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks critical details about what is copied, what inputs are required (board ID), what is returned (new board object), and side effects (original board unchanged, new ID generated). These details are essential for AI agents to understand the operation's scope and effects.

data.current_description: Create a copy of an existing board.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a duplicate copy of an existing board with all its content. Requires the source board ID in the request. Returns the newly created board object with a generated ID. The original board remains unchanged. Note: Copied board will have the same content but a new unique identifier.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical details about what is copied, what inputs are required (board ID), what is returned (new board object), and side effects (original board unchanged, new ID generated). These details are essential for AI agents to understand the operation's scope and effects.

message: Operation 'boardRename' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is too minimal. Missing details about required inputs (board ID, new name), what is returned (updated board object), and clarification that only the name changes. AI agents need this specificity to properly construct requests and interpret responses.

data.current_description: Rename an existing board.
data.description_suggestion: Renames an existing board to a new name. Requires the board ID and new name in the request. Returns the updated board object with the new name. The board's content and other properties remain unchanged.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal. Missing details about required inputs (board ID, new name), what is returned (updated board object), and clarification that only the name changes. AI agents need this specificity to properly construct requests and interpret responses.

message: Operation 'boardDelete' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks critical information about inputs (board ID required), outputs (success confirmation), and important side effects (permanent deletion, content removal, irreversibility). AI agents must understand the destructive nature and permanence of this operation.

data.current_description: Delete an existing board.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes an existing board and all its associated content. Requires the board ID in the request. Returns a success confirmation. This action is irreversible - the board and all its content will be removed from the system.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical information about inputs (board ID required), outputs (success confirmation), and important side effects (permanent deletion, content removal, irreversibility). AI agents must understand the destructive nature and permanence of this operation.
